changes: PDF Speed Reading: Open any PDF — local or online — and speed-read it directly in the SkimFlow overlay.
AI Summarization: Select text, right-click, and choose "Summarize with SkimFlow" to get an instant AI-powered summary using Chrome's built-in Summarizer API.
Smart Summarization: Long texts are automatically chunked and summarized in sections, then combined into a single concise summary.
Live Status Updates: Real-time feedback on AI model download progress and summarization status.
Context Menu Reading: Select any text on a webpage, right-click, and choose "Read with SkimFlow" to read just that selection.
Robust Injection: Improved reliability when using the extension on freshly opened tabs.
Settings Sync: Context menu reading now respects your saved WPM and theme settings.
